hero.title: Next-Generation Bio Simulation
hero.subtitle: A computational biology platform — launch specialized tools for structure, prediction, and analysis.

helix.name: Helix

phaeleon.name: Phaeleon
phaeleon.description: FDA OpenFDA drug search with rule-based interaction assessment — ported from DDI checker, no cloud AI required.

visualization.title: Protein Visualization
visualization.description: Advanced molecular structure viewing with AlphaFold integration

simulation.title: Bio Simulation
simulation.description: Real-time molecular dynamics and interaction simulation

layers.title: Layer System
layers.description: Photoshop-like layer management for complex molecular systems

hud.title: Scientific HUD
hud.description: Real-time metrics, energy calculations, and analysis tools
